html:for-each.declare: <DATOS oi_empresa="1" salida="HTML" gcustom="" gpers="" liq_cod="" liq_f_des="202506" liq_f_has="" liq_f_pag_des="" liq_f_pag_has="" liq_oi_tipo_liq="" liq_c_estado="" l_listar_lsd="" liqID="3202" liqs="3202" cb_confidenciales="" where="LEG.oi_empresa=1" />

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp as id, LEG.e_numero_legajo as legajo, SEC.policy from PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, LIQ07_PERSONAL as LIQ, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC JOIN PER.oi_personal inner LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer LIQ.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp in (select PL.oi_personal_emp from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL WHERE PL.oi_liquidacion in ({%=$FILTRO/@liqs %})) {%? ($FILTRO/@where != "") {% AND {%=$FILTRO/@where %} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY legajo asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry_conceptos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CON.e_secuencia, CLP.n_valor AS valor, CLP.n_cantidad AS cantidad, CON.c_tipo_concepto, T.d_tipo_concepto, T.e_orden FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS AS C, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS T JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per, CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, C.c_concepto INNER CON.c_concepto, C.oi_tipo_concepto INNER T.oi_tipo_concepto WHERE T.l_nolistado = 0 and CLP.n_valor != 0 and CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' AND T.c_tipo_concepto != 4 AND T.c_tipo_concepto != 6 AND TLP.oi_tot_liq_per = {#SOURCE:@oi_tot_liq_per} ORDER BY e_orden ASC, c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
